behavioral_rules.name: rapid_file_sweep
behavioral_rules.description: 50+ file reads in 60s — possible data harvesting

behavioral_rules.name: credential_file_access
behavioral_rules.description: Repeated access to credential/key files within 5 min

behavioral_rules.name: read_then_shell
behavioral_rules.description: Shell exec immediately after file read — possible exfil pipeline

behavioral_rules.name: network_after_secret
behavioral_rules.description: Network request within 30s of credential access — exfil risk

behavioral_rules.name: mass_file_write
behavioral_rules.description: 20+ file writes in 60s — possible ransomware or exfil staging
